void class_add_field ( class_t *  cl,
const field_info_t *  info,
const field_attributes_t *  attr 
)

Adds a field to the class

Parameters:
cl A pointer to a class being loaded
info A pointer to the information of the new field
attr A pointer to the field attributes of the new field

field_t* class_get_field ( const class_t *  cl,
const char *  name,
const char *  descriptor,
bool  stat 
)

Finds a field by its name and descriptor, this function will only look for the field inside the specified class, not its parents

Parameters:
cl A pointer to the class where to look for the field
name The field name
descriptor The descriptor name
stat true if the field looked for is static, false otherwise
Returns:
A pointer to the field or NULL if none was found

Definition at line 153 of file class.c.

References field_t::descriptor, field_is_static(), class_t::fields, class_t::fields_n, and field_t::name.

Referenced by KNI_GetFieldID(), KNI_GetStaticFieldID(), and lookup_field().

bool class_is_parent ( const class_t *  parent,
const class_t *  child 
)

Returns true if child is a child class of parent

Parameters:
parent The potentially parent class
child The potentially child class
Returns:
true if child inherits from parent, false otherwise
